debug_info.goal:
case inr
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
inst✝⁶ : Fintype ι
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
E : ι → Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : (i : ι) → NormedAddCommGroup (E i)
inst✝⁴ : (i : ι) → NormedSpace ℝ (E i)
inst✝³ : (i : ι) → MeasurableSpace (E i)
inst✝² : ∀ (i : ι), CompleteSpace (E i)
inst✝¹ : ∀ (i : ι), BorelSpace (E i)
inst✝ : ∀ (i : ι), SecondCountableTopology (E i)
X : (i : ι) → Ω → E i
h : ∀ (i : ι), HasGaussianLaw (X i) P
hX : iIndepFun X P
this : IsProbabilityMeasure P
hι : Nonempty ι
⊢ ∃ m f,
    f.toBilinForm.IsPosSemidef ∧
      ∀ (L : StrongDual ℝ ((x : ι) → E x)),
        charFunDual (Measure.map (fun ω x => X x ω) P) L = exp (↑(L m) * I - ↑((f L) L) / 2)

failed_attempts:
use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval (Pi.single i 1) * L.eval (Pi.single j 1)) • cov[X i, X j; P]
    constructor
    · -- positivity of the bilinear form
      intro L
      simp only [Pi.single_apply, Pi.one_apply, mul_one, one_mul, smul_eq_mul]
      exact by
        have : 0 ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval (Pi.single i 1) * L.eval (Pi.single j 1)) * cov[X i, X j; P] := by
          calc
            _ = ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval (Pi.single i 1) * L.eval (Pi.single j 1)) * cov[X i, X j; P] := rfl
            _ = Var[fun ω ↦ ∑ i, L.eval (Pi.single i 1) * X i ω; P] := by
              rw [variance_sum_cov]
              congrm ∑ i, ∑ j, _
              · exact fun i j ↦ by simp [cov_comm]
            _ ≥ 0 := by exact variance_nonneg
        exact this
    · intro L
      simp only [Pi.single_apply, Pi.one_apply, mul_one, one_mul, smul_eq_mul]
      have : charFunDual (Measure.map (fun ω x => X x ω) P) L =
          charFun (P.map (fun ω ↦ L (X · ω))) 1 := by
        simp [charFunDual, charFun]
      rw [this]
      have : L (X · ω) = ∑ i, L.eval (Pi.single i 1) * X i ω := by
        simp [Pi.single_apply, Pi.one_apply, mul_one, one_mul, smul_eq_mul]
        exact L.ext_linear (fun i ↦ by simp)
      rw [this]
      have : charFun (P.map (fun ω ↦ ∑ i, L.eval (Pi.single i 1) * X i ω)) 1 =
          exp (∑ i, L.eval (Pi.single i 1) * P[X i] * I -
            ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval (Pi.single i 1) : ℂ) * L.eval (Pi.single j 1) * cov[X i, X j; P] / 2) := by
        have : HasGaussianLaw (fun ω ↦ ∑ i, L.eval (Pi.single i 1) * X i ω) P := by
          apply HasGaussianLaw.linear_combination
          · exact h
          · exact fun i ↦ by simp
        exact IsGaussian.charFun_eq' this
      rw [this]
      congrm exp (∑ i, ?_ * P[X i] * I - ∑ i, ∑ j, (?_ * ?_) * cov[X i, X j; P] / 2)
      · rfl
      · rfl

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i (X i - fun _ ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) * (L (Pi.single j (X j - fun _ ↦ ∫ ω, X j ω ∂P)))
    constructor
    · exact fun _ ↦ by positivity
    · intro L
      simp_rw [charFunDual, Measure.map_map]
      have := charFun_indep_fun hX (fun i ↦ X i) L
      rw [this]
      congrm exp (∑ i, ?_ - _ / 2)
      · exact fun i ↦ by
          rw [charFun_apply, ← integral_sub_const, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm]
          simp [h i, HasGaussianLaw.charFun_eq]
      · sorry

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval i) * (L.eval j) * cov[X i, X j; P]
    constructor
    · intro v
      simp only [QuadraticForm.toBilinForm_apply, PiLp.summable_of_mem_L2, mul_assoc]
      exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ => by
        exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun j _ => by
          exact mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (cov_pos_semi_def.mpr (HasGaussianLaw.cov_pos_semi (h i) (h j)))
    · intro L
      simp only [charFunDual_def, Measure.map_map, Function.comp]
      have : charFun (P.map (fun ω ↦ fun i ↦ X i ω)) (fun i ↦ L.eval i) =
        exp (∑ i, (L.eval i) * (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P) * I - ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval i : ℂ) * (L.eval j) * (cov[X i, X j; P] / 2)) := by
        apply HasGaussianLaw.charFun_toLp_pi
        infer_instance
      rw [this]
      congr 1
      · ext i
        simp [PiLp.toLp_apply]
      · ring

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (0 : E i) + Pi.single j (0 : E j)) - L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (0 : E i)) - L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single j (0 : E j)))^2 / 2
    constructor
    · -- Positivity follows from independence and individual Gaussian laws
      sorry
    · intro L
      have h_char : charFunDual (Measure.map (fun ω x => X x ω) P) L =
        ∏ i, charFun (P.map (X i)) (L.toContinuousLinearMap ∘ Pi.single i) := by
        apply iIndepFun.charFun_prod hX
        exact fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable
      rw [h_char]
      have h_ind : ∀ i, charFun (P.map (X i)) (L.toContinuousLinearMap ∘ Pi.single i) =
        exp ((L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) * I -
          (∑ j, ∑ k, if j = i ∧ k = i then (L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (0 : E i) + Pi.single k (0 : E k)) - L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (0 : E i)) - L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single k (0 : E k)))^2 / 2 else 0) / 2) := by
        intro i
        rw [(h i).charFun_eq]
        sorry
      rw [Finset.prod_exp]
      congrm exp _
      sorry

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (0 : E i) + Pi.single j (0 : E j)) - L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (0 : E i)) - L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single j (0 : E j)))^2 / 2
    constructor

        apply iIndepFun.charFun_prod hX
        exact fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable
      rw [charFun_prod]
      -- Replace each factor with its Gaussian characteristic function
      have : ∀ i, charFun (P.map (X i)) (L.toContinuousLinearMap ∘ Pi.single i) =
        exp ((L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) * I -
          (L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (0 : E i)) - L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P)))^2 / 2) := by
        intro i
        rw [(h i).charFun_eq]
        simp [Pi.single_apply]
      simp_all only [this]
      -- Combine the product of exponentials into a single exponential

      · ext1
        simp [Pi.single_apply]
      · -- Show that the variance term matches the defined bilinear form

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval i).compContinuousLinearMap (L.eval j) * cov[X i, X j; P]
    constructor
    · intro L
      simp only [BilinForm.IsPosSemidef, PiLp.summable_norm, mul_comm]
      exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ by
        exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun j _ ↦ by
          have := h i
          have := h j
          exact by positivity
    · intro L
      simp only [charFunDual_apply, PiLp.coeFn_toLp, Function.comp_def, PiLp.toLp_apply]
      have h_indep : IndependentFun (fun i ↦ (L.eval i).comp X i) P := by
        apply iIndepFun.comp_continuous_linear_map hX
      have h_gauss : ∀ i, HasGaussianLaw ((L.eval i).comp X i) P := by
        intro i
        exact HasGaussianLaw.comp_continuous_linear_map (h i)
      calc
        charFun (P.map fun ω ↦ (L.eval ·).comp X · ω) 1
          = ∏ i, charFun (P.map ((L.eval i).comp X i)) 1 := by
            apply charFun_pi_of_independent h_indep
          _ = ∏ i, exp ((L.eval i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P)) * I - (Var[(L.eval i).comp X i; P] / 2)) := by
            apply Finset.prod_congr rfl
            intro i _
            rw [HasGaussianLaw.charFun_eq (h_gauss i)]
          _ = exp (∑ i, (L.eval i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P)) * I - ∑ i, Var[(L.eval i).comp X i; P] / 2) := by
            simp [exp_sum, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_div]
          _ = exp ((L (∫ ω, X · ω ∂P)) * I - (∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval i).compContinuousLinearMap (L.eval j) * cov[X i, X j; P]) L / 2) := by
            congr 1
            · rw [← PiLp.sum_eval]
            · rw [variance_as_covariance, ← Finset.sum_sum_distrib]
              apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
              intro i _
              apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
              intro j _
              simp [cov_comp_continuous_linear_map]

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (0 : E i) + Pi.single j (0 : E j)) - L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (0 : E i)) - L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single j (0 : E j)))^2 / 2
    constructor
    · -- positivity follows from independence and Gaussianity of components
      sorry
    · intro L

        · rfl

      rw [this]

      congr 1
      rw [← Finset.sum_sum_product]
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i (X i - fun ω ↦ ∫ ω', X i ω' ∂P))) *
      (L (Pi.single j (X j - fun ω ↦ ∫ ω', X j ω' ∂P)))
    constructor
    · exact fun L ↦ by
        simp only [Pi.single_apply, Pi.sub_apply, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm]
        exact by positivity
    · intro L
      simp only [charFunDual, Measure.map_map, Function.comp]
      have h_ind : IndependentFun (fun i ↦ (fun ω ↦ L (Pi.single i (X i ω)))) P :=
        hX.mono (fun i ↦ continuousLinearMap.comp_continuous_linear_map L (continuousLinearMap.single i))
      have h_gauss : ∀ i, IsGaussian (Measure.map (fun ω ↦ L (Pi.single i (X i ω))) P) :=
        fun i ↦ (h i).isGaussian_map.mono (continuousLinearMap.comp_continuous_linear_map L (continuousLinearMap.single i))
      have h_mean : ∀ i, ∫ ω, L (Pi.single i (X i ω)) ∂P = L (Pi.single i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P)) := by
        intro i
        rw [integral_comp_continuous_linear_map]
        exact (h i).integrable
      have h_var : ∀ i j, i ≠ j → ∫ ω, (L (Pi.single i (X i ω)) - ∫ ω', L (Pi.single i (X i ω')) ∂P) *
        (L (Pi.single j (X j ω)) - ∫ ω', L (Pi.single j (X j ω')) ∂P) ∂P = 0 := by
        intro i j hij
        rw [← sub_eq_zero]
        have := h_ind.independent_integral_of_aemeasurable hij
          (fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable.mono (measurable_comp measurable_fst measurable_snd))
          (fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable.mono (measurable_comp measurable_fst measurable_snd))
        simpa [h_mean] using this
      calc
        charFun (P.map (fun ω ↦ L (X · ω))) 1
          = exp (∑ i, (∫ ω, L (Pi.single i (X i ω)) ∂P) * I -
            ∑ i, ∑ j, (∫ ω, (L (Pi.single i (X i ω)) - ∫ ω', L (Pi.single i (X i ω')) ∂P) *
              (L (Pi.single j (X j ω)) - ∫ ω', L (Pi.single j (X j ω')) ∂P) ∂P) / 2) := by
            apply charFun_independent_sum h_ind h_gauss
          _ = exp (L (∑ i, Pi.single i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P)) * I -
            ∑ i, ∑ j, (∫ ω, (L (Pi.single i (X i ω - fun ω' ↦ ∫ ω'', X i ω'' ∂P))) *
              (L (Pi.single j (X j ω - fun ω' ↦ ∫ ω'', X j ω'' ∂P))) ∂P) / 2) := by
            simp_rw [h_mean, Pi.single_sum, ← sub_eq_add_neg]
          _ = exp (L (fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P) * I -
            ∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i (X i - fun ω ↦ ∫ ω', X i ω' ∂P))) *
              (L (Pi.single j (X j - fun ω ↦ ∫ ω', X j ω' ∂P))) / 2) := by
            congrm exp (_ * I - ?_ / 2)
            ext1
            simp_rw [Pi.single_apply, Pi.sub_apply]
            exact by ring

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i (X i · - (fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P) i))) * (L (Pi.single j (X j · - (fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P) i)))
    constructor
    · intro v
      simp only [QuadraticForm.toBilinForm_apply, Pi.single_apply, sub_eq_add_neg, neg_mul, add_mul]
      positivity
    · intro L
      simp only [charFunDual_def, Measure.map_map]
      have h_indep : IndependentFun (fun i ↦ (fun ω ↦ L (Pi.single i (X i ω)))) P :=
        hX.mono fun i ↦ continuousLinearMap.compContinuousLinearMap.continuous.aemeasurable
      have h_gauss : ∀ i, IsGaussian (Measure.map (fun ω ↦ L (Pi.single i (X i ω))) P) :=
        fun i ↦ (h i).map (continuousLinearMap.compContinuousLinearMap)
      calc
        charFun (P.map fun ω ↦ L (X · ω)) 1
          = ∏ i, charFun (P.map fun ω ↦ L (Pi.single i (X i ω))) 1 := by
              apply h_indep.charFun_prod
              exact fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable.mono (continuousLinearMap.compContinuousLinearMap.continuous.aemeasurable)
        _ = ∏ i, exp ((L (Pi.single i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) * I - (L (Pi.single i (X i · - ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P)))^2 / 2) := by
              apply Finset.prod_congr rfl
              intro i _
              rw [h_gauss i.charFun_eq]
              simp [covariance_eq_variance_of_centered, integral_sub, integral_const, sub_mul]
        _ = exp (∑ i, (L (Pi.single i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) * I - ∑ i, (L (Pi.single i (X i · - ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P)))^2 / 2) := by
              simp [exp_sum, Finset.sum_div, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        _ = exp (L (fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P) * I - (∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i (X i · - ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) * (L (Pi.single j (X j · - ∫ ω, X j ω ∂P)))) / 2) := by
              congr 1
              · simp [← Finset.sum_mul, ← L.map_sum, Pi.single_sum]
              · ring

    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval (Pi.single i 1) : ℝ) * (L.eval (Pi.single j 1) : ℝ) * cov[X i, X j; P]

        intro i

      congr 1

          ∑ i, (L.eval (Pi.single i 1) : ℂ) ^ 2 * Var[X i; P] := by

          simp_all [covariance_sum]

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P

    constructor
    · -- Positivity of the bilinear form follows from independence and individual Gaussian laws
      intro v

      simp_rw [this]

    · intro L
      simp only [charFunDual_def, Measure.map_map]
      have : charFun (P.map (fun ω ↦ fun i ↦ X i ω)) (fun i ↦ L.eval (Pi.single i (1 : ℝ))) =
        exp (∑ i, (L.eval (Pi.single i (1 : ℝ)) : ℂ) * (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P) * I -
          ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval (Pi.single i (1 : ℝ)) : ℂ) * (L.eval (Pi.single j (1 : ℝ)) : ℂ) * (cov[X i, X j; P] / 2)) := by

    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i (0 : E i) + Pi.single j (0 : E j)) - L (Pi.single i (0 : E i)) - L (Pi.single j (0 : E j)))^2 / 2
    constructor
    · sorry

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, L (Pi.single i (X i ·)) * L (Pi.single j (X j ·)) / 2
    constructor
    · -- positivity follows from covariance structure of independent Gaussians
      intro v
      simp only [BilinForm.IsPosSemidef, ge_iff_le, zero_le_one]
      -- This would require more detailed spectral argument, but for independent Gaussians,
      -- the covariance bilinear form is sum of positive semidefinite forms, hence pos semidef.
      sorry
    · intro L
      -- Use independence to factor characteristic function
      have charFun_prod : charFunDual (Measure.map (fun ω x => X x ω) P) L =
        ∏ i, charFun (P.map (X i)) (L ∘ Pi.single i) := by
        -- This is the key property of independent random variables:
        -- characteristic function of joint distribution is product of marginals
        sorry
      rw [charFun_prod]
      -- Now use Gaussian characteristic function formula for each marginal
      have each_char : ∀ i, charFun (P.map (X i)) (L ∘ Pi.single i) =
        exp ((L (Pi.single i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) * I - (L (Pi.single i (X i ·)) * L (Pi.single i (X i ·))) / 2) := by
        intro i
        have := h i
        rw [← IsGaussian.charFun_eq']
        -- Need to connect variance with bilinear form
        sorry
      -- Combine using exp sum = product exp
      simp_rw [each_char, Finset.prod_exp, Finset.sum_mul, ← mul_div_assoc]
      congrm exp (?_ * I - ?_ / 2)
      · -- Mean term
        sorry
      · -- Covariance term
        sorry

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i (0 : E i) + Pi.single j (0 : E j)) - L (Pi.single i (0 : E i)) - L (Pi.single j (0 : E j)))^2 / 2
    constructor
    · sorry
    · intro L
      sorry

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i (X i · - ⟨i⟩.out))) * (L (Pi.single j (X j · - ⟨j⟩.out))) * cov[X i, X j; P]
    constructor
    · -- Positivity of the bilinear form follows from independence and individual Gaussian laws
      intro L
      simp only [Pi.single_apply, Pi.single_eq_same, Pi.single_eq_of_ne]
      have : ∀ i j, i ≠ j → cov[X i, X j; P] = 0 := by
        intro i j hij
        exact hX.indep_fun_pair i j hij |>.cov_eq_zero (h i).integrable (h j).integrable
      simp_rw [this]
      positivity
    · intro L
      simp only [Pi.single_apply, Pi.single_eq_same, Pi.single_eq_of_ne]
      have : ∀ i j, i ≠ j → cov[X i, X j; P] = 0 := by
        intro i j hij
        exact hX.indep_fun_pair i j hij |>.cov_eq_zero (h i).integrable (h j).integrable
      simp_rw [this]

        ∏ i, charFun (P.map (X i)) (L (Pi.single i (1 : E i))) := by
        rw [charFunDual_pi, hX.charFun_prod]
        · rfl
        · exact fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable
      rw [this]

        intro i

        congr 1
        · rw [← integral_mul_left]
          congr 1
          ext1
          simp
        · rw [← mul_assoc]
          congr 1
          ext1
          simp
      simp_rw [this]
      rw [Finset.prod_exp]
      congr 1
      · rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
        congr 1
        intro i
        simp
      · rw [← Finset.sum_div]
        congr 1
        intro i
        ring

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval i) (L.eval j) • cov[X i, X j; P]
    constructor
    · intro L
      simp only [BilinForm.IsPosSemidef, PiLp.summable_norm, ge_iff_le, zero_le_one]

    · intro L
      simp only [charFunDual_def, Measure.map_map, Function.comp_apply]

        ∏ i, charFun (P.map (X i)) (L.eval i) := by

      rw [h_ind]
      simp_rw [HasGaussianLaw.charFun_eq' (h _)]

      · congrm ∑ i, _
        rw [← integral_sum (fun i ↦ L.eval i) (fun i ↦ HasGaussianLaw.integrable (h i))]
        congrm _
        ext ω

      · congrm ∑ i, _
        rw [Finset.sum_div]
        congrm ∑ i, _
        rw [Finset.sum_mul]
        congrm ∑ i, _
        ext j
        simp [covarianceBilin_apply_pi, PiLp.summable_norm, Fintype.finite]

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P, fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval i).compContinuousLinearMap (L.eval j) * cov[X i, X j; P]
    constructor
    · intro L
      simp only [BilinForm.IsPosSemidef, ge_iff_le, zero_le_one]
      exact fun z ↦ by
        simp only [map_sum, PiLp.sum_apply, compContinuousLinearMap_apply, mul_assoc]
        exact by
          have : 0 ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval i z) * (L.eval j z) * cov[X i, X j; P] := by
            calc
              ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.eval i z) * (L.eval j z) * cov[X i, X j; P]
                = ∑ i, ∑ j, cov[(L.eval i z) • X i, (L.eval j z) • X j; P] := by
                    simp_rw [cov_smul_left, cov_smul_right]
              _ = Var[∑ i, (L.eval i z) • X i; P] := by
                    simp_rw [var_sum, cov_add_left, cov_add_right]
              _ ≥ 0 := by exact var_nonneg _
          exact this
    · intro L
      simp only [charFunDual_apply, map_map, Function.comp_apply, PiLp.sum_apply,
        compContinuousLinearMap_apply, mul_assoc]
      have h_indep : IndepFun (fun i ↦ L.eval i ∘ X i) P := by
        refine' hX.mono _ fun i _ ↦ _
        exact measurable_comp (continuous_linear_map.continuous _) measurable_of_measurable_coe
      have h_gauss : ∀ i, HasGaussianLaw (L.eval i ∘ X i) P := by
        intro i
        exact (h i).comp_continuous_linear_map (L.eval i)
      have h_char : charFun (P.map fun ω ↦ ∑ i, L.eval i (X i ω)) 1 =
        exp (∑ i, (1 : ℂ) * (∫ ω, L.eval i (X i ω) ∂P) * I -
          ∑ i, ∑ j, (1 : ℂ) * (1 : ℂ) * cov[L.eval i ∘ X i, L.eval j ∘ X j; P] / 2) := by
        convert (HasGaussianLaw.charFun_toLp_pi (X := fun i ↦ L.eval i ∘ X i) (ξ := 1)) using 1
        · ext
          simp
        · intro i
          exact h_gauss i
        · simp
      simp only [charFun_apply, map_map, Function.comp_apply, integral_comp] at h_char
      rw [← h_char]
      congr 1
      · ring
      · simp only [cov_comp_continuous_linear_map_left, cov_comp_continuous_linear_map_right]
        ring

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P, fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (X i ·)) * L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single j (X j ·))) / 2
    constructor
    · exact fun L ↦ by
        simp only [BilinForm.IsPosSemidef, Pi.single_apply, sum_sum_single, ge_iff_le]
        positivity
    · intro L

        hX.mono (fun i ↦ ContinuousLinearMap.continuous _) (fun i ↦ by fun_prop)
      have h_char : charFun (P.map (fun ω ↦ ∑ i, L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (X i ω)))) 1 =
        ∏ i, charFun (P.map (fun ω ↦ L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (X i ω)))) 1 := by

        · fun_prop

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i (X i · - ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) * (L (Pi.single j (X j · - ∫ ω, X j ω ∂P)))
    constructor
    · intro v
      simp only [BilinForm.IsPosSemidef, ge_iff_le, zero_le', map_sum]
      positivity
    · intro L
      simp only [charFunDual, PiLp.toLp_apply, Pi.single_apply, Function.update_same,
        Function.update_noteq, ne_eq, not_false_eq_true, if_true, if_false]
      have h_indep : IndependentFun (fun i ↦ (fun ω ↦ L (Pi.single i (X i ω)))) P :=
        hX.mono (fun i ↦ continuousLinearMap.compL_restrict _) (by aesop)
      have h_char : charFun (P.map fun ω ↦ ∑ i, L (Pi.single i (X i ω))) 1 =
        ∏ i, charFun (P.map fun ω ↦ L (Pi.single i (X i ω))) 1 := by
        simpa using h_indep.charFun_prod (by aesop)
      rw [← h_char]
      have h_gauss : ∀ i, IsGaussian (P.map fun ω ↦ L (Pi.single i (X i ω))) := by
        intro i
        exact (h i).map (continuousLinearMap.compL_restrict _)
      calc
        charFun (P.map fun ω ↦ ∑ i, L (Pi.single i (X i ω))) 1
          = ∏ i, charFun (P.map fun ω ↦ L (Pi.single i (X i ω))) 1 := by rw [h_char]
        _ = ∏ i, exp (↑(L (Pi.single i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) * I -
            ↑(Var[L (Pi.single i (X i ·)); P]) / 2) := by
              refine' Finset.prod_congr rfl fun i _ => _
              rw [IsGaussian.charFun_eq]
              · simp [h_gauss i]
              · exact (h i).aemeasurable.mono (fun _ _ => L.continuous.aemeasurable)
        _ = exp (∑ i, ↑(L (Pi.single i (∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) * I -
            ∑ i, ↑(Var[L (Pi.single i (X i ·)); P]) / 2) := by
              simp [exp_sum, Finset.sum_div, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        _ = exp (↑(L fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P) * I -
            ↑(∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i (X i · - ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) *
              (L (Pi.single j (X j · - ∫ ω, X j ω ∂P)))) / 2) := by
              congr 1
              · simp [← Finset.sum_mul, ← Finset.mul_sum, L.map_sum]
              · simp [Var.eq_integral_sq_sub_sq_integral, integral_sub, integral_const,
                  sub_mul, mul_sub, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_add_distrib,
                  ← Finset.sum_mul, ← Finset.mul_sum, h_indep.covariance_zero]
                ring

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i ·)) * (L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single j ·)) * cov[X i, X j; P]
    constructor
    · intro v
      simp only [QuadraticForm.toBilinForm_apply, Pi.single_apply, mul_assoc]
      exact by
        have : 0 ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, (v i) * (v j) * cov[X i, X j; P] := by
          calc
            _ = Var[∑ i, v i • X i; P] := by
              simp_rw [cov_sum, smul_eq_mul, ← Finset.sum_mul, ← Finset.mul_sum]
              congrm Var[∑ i, ?_ • X i; P]

            _ ≥ 0 := by exact variance_nonneg _
        simpa using this
    · intro L
      simp only [charFunDual_def, Measure.map_map, Function.comp]
      have : charFun (P.map (fun ω ↦ L (X · ω))) 1 = exp (↑(L (fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P)) * I - ↑(∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i id)) * (L (Pi.single j id)) * cov[X i, X j; P]) / 2) := by
        have hL : HasGaussianLaw (fun ω ↦ L (X · ω)) P := by
          apply IsGaussian.linear_image
          · exact hX.isGaussian
          · exact L.toContinuousLinearMap.continuous
        have : charFun (P.map (fun ω ↦ L (X · ω))) 1 = exp (↑(∫ ω, L (X · ω) ∂P) * I - ↑(Var[L (X · ·); P]) / 2) := by
          rw [IsGaussian.charFun_eq']
          · simp
          · exact hL.integrable
        rw [this]
        congrm exp (↑?_ * I - ↑?_ / 2)
        · rw [integral_piLp_apply, ← integral_smul]
          simp_rw [Pi.single_apply, smul_eq_mul]
          congrm ∑ i, ?_
          intro i
          rw [← integral_mul]
          · simp
          · exact h i.integrable
          · exact hX.aemeasurable
        · rw [variance_eq_integral_sq_sub_sq_integral]
          simp_rw [Pi.single_apply, smul_eq_mul, ← Finset.sum_mul, ← Finset.mul_sum]
          congrm (∫ (_ : Ω), (∑ i, ?_ * X i _) ^ 2 ∂P) - (∑ i, ?_ * ∫ (_ : Ω), X i _ ∂P) ^ 2
          · intro i
            rw [← integral_mul]
            · simp
            · exact h i.integrable
            · exact hX.aemeasurable
          · intro i
            rw [← integral_mul]
            · simp
            · exact h i.integrable
            · exact hX.aemeasurable
      simpa [charFunDual_def] using this

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P, fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (0 : E i) + Pi.single j (0 : E j)) - L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (0 : E i)) - L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single j (0 : E j)))^2 / 2

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single i (X i · - ⟨i⟩))) * (L.toContinuousLinearMap (Pi.single j (X j · - ⟨j⟩)))

        sorry
    · intro L
      have := hX.independence_integral_prod hι
      sorry

use fun i ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P
    use fun L ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, (L (Pi.single i (X i - fun _ ↦ ∫ ω, X i ω ∂P))) * (L (Pi.single j (X j - fun _ ↦ ∫ ω, X j ω ∂P)))
    constructor
    · exact fun L ↦ by positivity
    · intro L
      simp only [charFunDual, Measure.map_apply, Function.comp]
      have := charFun_iIndepFun hX (fun i ↦ L (Pi.single i ·))
      rw [this]
      simp_rw [charFun, Complex.exp_add]
      congrm exp (∑ i, _ - ∑ i, _ / 2)
      · exact fun i ↦ by
          rw [← sub_eq_zero]
          have := h i
          have := this.charFun_eq
          simp_all
      · exact fun i ↦ by
          rw [← sub_eq_zero]
          have := h i
          have := this.charFun_eq
          simp_all
